title: Always Day
description: A client-side mod that keeps your sky set to midday forever. Works on multiplayer servers.
body:
# ☀️ Always Day (Always Mid-Day)

A lightweight, client-side only Fabric mod that permanently locks the visual sky time to midday (**6,000 ticks**). Perfect for players who prefer bright, beautiful days without having to use commands or cheats!

## ✨ Features
* **🕒 Permanent Midday Sky**: Locks the client-side visual time to exactly 12:00 PM (6,000 ticks).
* **🖥️ Client-Side Only**: 100% server and multiplayer compatible. No server installation required! You can use it on any public server or realm without issues.
* **⚡ Zero Configuration**: Just drop the JAR into your `mods/` directory and enjoy eternal sunshine.
* **🌱 Fully Compatible**: Compatible with all major Fabric mods and optimization engines (Sodium, Lithium, Iris, etc.).

## 📦 Requirements
* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API
